title: Diamond Upgrade Template
description: This mod makes it so that you can upgrade iron tools and armour to diamond and adds a new trading option for the villager profession armorer
body:
**Iron Upgrade Template**
=========
This mod makes it so that you can upgrade iron tools and armour to diamond and adds a new trading option for the villager profession armorer.

Trading:

- For now, the only way to get the Diamond Upgrade Template
- Armorer villager must be at Journeyman level
- Cost 17 emeralds for 1 Diamond Upgrade Template

Recipes:
